text: It's another one of our typical nights.
We have three huskies and two cats, and they all prefer to sleep next to us.
We're not gonna show you all night.
We have increased the video speed.
We also cut out all the moments where no one moves for a long time.
Olive usually falls asleep before anyone else and sleeps through the night.
Looks like Olive needed a night out.
Monty was worried that part of the pack had gone somewhere.
Maybe now everyone will calm down and start sleeping.
All huskies prefer a cool floor, and cats warm our pillows.
We are often asked how we deal with the smell of dogs.
An open window is enough, and frequent floor cleaning.

In addition, huskies differ from all other dogs 
in that they practically do not have the smell of a dog.
And brushing our pets daily solves the problem of wool on the sheets.
We've already gotten used to all this fuss and sleep pretty soundly.
Every morning, the cats unsuccessfully try to wake us up.
Write to us in the comments if your sleep is at least a little like ours.
Monty is always the first dog to wake up.
He's the only one who tries to wake us up every morning.
Well, that's pretty much how every night goes.
It may seem strange to some, but we're perfectly happy.
Who else will you get so much unconditional love from every morning?
There is always a dog or cat in the world that needs your care.
I like the phrase “why get a dog if you won't let him in the bed?”
Thank you to everyone who watched this video!
We wish for each of you to find love in this world.
